user_feedback: the game should be centered in the middle of the screen, wasd should be my char, while the arrow keys should control the camera, and I want the camera to be behind the player facing the player instead of top-down, can you fix this
analysis:
- Issue identified: Three main issues: (1) Game not centered on screen, (2) Both WASD and arrow keys control player movement when they should be separate (WASD for player, arrows for camera), (3) Camera appears too top-down instead of being behind the player at a third-person angle
- Files affected: index.html, renderer.js, input.js, camera.js, globals.js
- Changes needed: 
  1. Center game container on screen using flexbox on body
  2. Separate input controls - WASD only for player, arrow keys only for camera rotation
  3. Add independent camera rotation controlled by arrow keys
  4. Adjust camera position to be closer and lower for a proper third-person behind-the-player view
